profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Mizuho Leasing Indonesia Tbk provides consumer finance and finance leasing services to individuals and financial institutions in Indonesia. The company offers a retail business unit, which includes investment financing, working capital financing, and multipurpose financing. The company also provides corporate business units, such as investment financing through direct lease or sale and lease back schemes for purchasing assets such as vehicles, machinery, heavy equipment, IT equipment, medical equipment, and others; accounts payable financing / account receivable financing, and invoice financing; and other financing business activities. The company was formerly known as PT. Verena Multi Finance Tbk and changed its name to PT Mizuho Leasing Indonesia Tbk in September 2022. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Mizuho Leasing Indonesia Tbk is a subsidiary of Mizuho Leasing Company, Limited.
